description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a job named "docker image" that runs docker info, sets IMAGE_TAG by replacing 'master' with 'latest' in $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN, builds the image with docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG . and pushes it with docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG. In the release stage add a job named "dist" that exports IMAGE_TAG similarly, updates example/Makefile replacing "latest" with $IMAGE_TAG, and stores the example directory as an artifact named $CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Both jobs run on all branches and tags.
